creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
All recent verbose runs suggest that the fastest is less than 1 MB per second, for example:

mkdir -p /usr/local/etc/pkg/repos/
echo 'FreeBSD: { url: "http://pkg0.fra.freebsd.org/${ABI}/base_latest", mirror_type: "NONE" }' \
        > /usr/local/etc/pkg/repos/FreeBSD.conf
